mapper.select: SELECT line_id, line_name, status FROM production_line WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY line_name ASC

SELECT pl.line_id, pl.line_name, pl.status, wo.order_id AS currentWorkOrder FROM production_line pl LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON pl.line_id = wo.line_id AND wo.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND wo.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY pl.line_id ASC
SELECT line_id, line_name, status FROM production_line WHERE line_id = #{lineId}

SELECT wo.order_id AS orderId, wo.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, wo.order_qty AS orderQty, wo.priority AS priority,
( SELECT pr.started_at FROM production_result pr WHERE pr.order_id = wo.order_id AND pr.ended_at IS NULL ORDER BY pr.started_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS startedAt,
wo.updated_at AS updatedAt, ( SELECT MIN(co.cl_delivery_date) FROM work_order_client_order wco JOIN client_order co ON wco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id WHERE wco.work_order_id = wo.order_id ) AS dueDate FROM work_order wo JOIN product p ON wo.product_id = p.product_id WHERE wo.line_id = #{lineId} AND wo.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND wo.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY wo.updated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT wo.order_id AS orderId, wo.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, wo.order_qty AS orderQty, wo.priority AS priority, ( SELECT MIN(co.cl_delivery_date) FROM work_order_client_order wco JOIN client_order co ON wco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id WHERE wco.work_order_id = wo.order_id ) AS dueDate FROM work_order wo JOIN product p ON wo.product_id = p.product_id WHERE wo.line_id = #{lineId} AND wo.status = 'READY' AND wo.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY CASE wo.priority WHEN 'EMERGENCY' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, wo.created_at ASC
